'''Boog''' was a [[Near-Human]] trader who served aboard the ''[[Port-Esta Queen]]'' during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] campaign against the [[Icarii]] on [[Vestar/Legends|Vestar]].

==Biography==
When [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] was hunting down [[Abal Karda]], he made his way to [[Port-Esta]] and spoke with the ''Port-Esta Queen's'' captain. Boog, meanwhile, rigged a crate of [[kneeb]]s to fall onto Fett. Fett realized this and flew out of the crate's way with his [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]]. Fett then killed Boog.

==Appearances==
*[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 2|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 2]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
